raw_input.title: Sr. Infrastructure Engineer - Kubernetes (Remote)
raw_input.job_html_or_text: Senior Infrastructure Engineer for Kubernetes at cybersecurity company. Large-scale distributed systems processing trillions of events per day, platform infrastructure, Kubernetes, reliability and security domain.

profile.base_cv_text: Backend Python/Django/FastAPI/PostgreSQL engineer. Docker/Kubernetes are familiar/supporting skills, not the central production infrastructure specialization.

human_review_notes: Reviewed real case: relevant adjacent infra role, but not direct APPLY_NOW for the current backend profile.
